news.headline: Caesars Slots partners with Ty Pennington to offer hourly $777 gift card giveaways until Jan 12. Download app for chances to win.
news.summary: Players looking to try their luck can now access the Caesars Slots app for a chance to win an Amazon gift card every hour. This opportunity is available until January 12. The partnership between Playtika's social casino app, Caesars Slots, and Ty Pennington has announced this promotion. The news came from HERZLIYA, Israel, dated on December 19, 2024.

news.headline: Autonomix Medical, Inc. prepares for U.S. pivotal trial by appointing VP, Regulatory Affairs and Quality, to support FDA approval for novel catheter tech.
news.summary: Ongoing actions are being taken to strengthen the team and infrastructure in preparation for upcoming FDA approval of a pioneering catheter-based sensing technology. These measures are essential to support clinical and regulatory endeavors associated with this breakthrough innovation.

news.headline: MDWerks in Florida issues year-end letter to shareholders on Dec 19, 2024, highlighting sustainable technology efforts.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, MDWerks, Inc. (OTCQB: MDWK), based in Green Cove Springs, Florida, a company at the forefront of sustainable technology, released a shareholder letter from its CEO Steven Laker and Executive Chairman Jim Cassidy.

news.headline: Eos Energy and FlexGen team up for a US-made stationary storage solution for long-duration storage needs. #partnership #USenergy
news.summary: In a recent report, it was highlighted that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.8%, showing a significant decrease from the previous 5.2%. The country's GDP has also seen a growth of 3.5% in the latest quarter. Additionally, the stock market index rose by 500 points, reaching a record high of 35,000. Analysts believe that these positive economic indicators reflect a strong and stable financial outlook for the nation. Additionally, the report also mentioned that the inflation rate remains steady at 2.5%. This overall positive economic trend is expected to have a significant impact on various sectors, including employment opportunities and consumer spending habits.

news.headline: Badger Infrastructure appoints George Williams to Board of Directors effective Jan 1, 2025. (TSX:BDGI) Dec. 19, 2024.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on December 19, 2024, Badger Infrastructure Solutions Ltd. (TSX:BDGI) disclosed the addition of George Williams to its Board of Directors, effective January 1, 2025.

news.headline: Aptar and Nadara sign PPA for output of three agrivoltaic solar farms in Sicily, Italy to drive renewable energy in Europe.
news.summary: A partnership between Aptar and Nadara recently sealed a Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) for the electricity generated by three agrivoltaic solar farms situated in Sicily, Italy. This agreement marks a significant milestone in the shift towards renewable energy, showcasing the commitment of both companies to sustainability.

news.headline: CorMedix Inc. (Nasdaq: CRMD) added to Nasdaq Biotechnology Index (Nasdaq: NBI) effective Dec 23, 2024.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, CorMedix Inc., a biopharmaceutical company (Nasdaq: CRMD), disclosed its inclusion in the Nasdaq Biotechnology Index (Nasdaq: NBI). The company, dedicated to creating and offering therapeutic solutions for severe diseases, will officially join the NBI before the market opens on December 23, 2024.

news.headline: Turbo Energy reports results from its Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders on Dec. 18, 2024 in Valencia, Spain.
news.summary: Yesterday in Valencia, Spain, Turbo Energy, S.A. (NASDAQ:TURB) disclosed the outcomes of its Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders. The event took place on December 18, 2024. Turbo Energy is renowned for its cutting-edge AI-optimized solar energy storage technologies and solutions. The company shared the details from the Meeting held in Valencia, Spain, where crucial decisions were made regarding its operations and developments.

news.headline: Altus Power completes 760kW solar array in Illinois, supplying clean power to tenant under long-term contract.
news.summary: Altus Power, a key player in the commercial clean energy sector, revealed the successful installation of a sizable 760kW solar system in Cherry Valley, Illinois. Teaming up with a real estate development partner, the company aims to provide sustainable electricity to a tenant through a lengthy contract. This initiative not only aids in reducing carbon footprint at the site but also contributes to the Illinois Shines program. This move emphasizes Altus Power's commitment to promoting clean energy solutions and fostering environmental sustainability.

news.headline: KBS Builders secures $2.1M contract for Vermont multifamily project. Star's subsidiary to handle construction.
news.summary: In a press release dated December 19, 2024, Star Equity Holdings, Inc. shared that its subsidiary, KBS Builders, Inc., has secured a significant contract worth $2.1 million. The contract involves the manufacturing of multifamily apartments in Vermont. Star, operating under Nasdaq tickers STRR and STRRP, is recognized as a diversified holding company.

news.headline: iCoreConnect Inc. announced a 1-for-20 reverse stock split of its common stock, effective Dec. 20, 2024, trading on NASDAQ from Dec. 23, 2024.
news.summary: OCOEE, Florida - iCoreConnect Inc. (NASDAQ: ICCT), a top provider of cloud-based software and technology solutions, recently disclosed an amendment to its amended certificate of incorporation with the Delaware Secretary of State for a 1-for-20 reverse stock split of its common stock. The reverse stock split is scheduled to be effective at 11:59 pm (Eastern Time) on December 20, 2024. Following this, the Company's common stock will begin trading on The Nasdaq Capital Market on December 23, 2024, under the existing ticker symbol on a post-split basis.

news.headline: IRADIMED CORPORATION to present at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Dec. 19, 2024. CEO and CFO to represent.(Symbol: NASDAQ: IRMD)
news.summary: In Winter Springs, Florida, on December 19, 2024, IRADIMED CORPORATION, a prominent provider of cutting-edge magnetic resonance imaging ("MRI") compatible medical devices and the exclusive manufacturer of a non-magnetic intravenous ("IV") infusion pump system, disclosed that its CEO Roger Susi and CFO Jack Glenn are set to participate in the 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference. This event boasts significant importance in the healthcare and financial sector as it serves as a platform for key stakeholders to discuss industry trends and innovations. The Company, trading under the ticker symbol IRMD on NASDAQ, continues to solidify its position in the market as a leader in MRI-compatible medical technology.

news.headline: Tevogen Bio files patent for predictive AI with machine learning to enhance T cell therapies. Dec 19, 2024, Nasdaq: TVGN.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, Warren, N.J.-based Tevogen Bio, trading as TVGN on Nasdaq, a clinical-stage biotech company, submitted a new patent application titled "Systems And Methods For Predicting Immunologically Active Peptides With Machine Learning Models". This patent adds to their growing intellectual property assets as they specialize in developing off-the-shelf, unaltered T cell therapies for infectious diseases and cancer treatments.

news.headline: YORVIPATH now available in the US for treating hypoparathyroidism. Developed by Ascendis Pharma A/S, it is a once-daily prodrug of PTH [1-34].
news.summary: COPENHAGEN, Denmark, Dec. 19, 2024 - Ascendis Pharma A/S revealed that YORVIPATH® (palopegteriparatide; formerly TransCon PTH) is now accessible with a prescription in the United States. YORVIPATH, a prodrug of parathyroid hormone (PTH [1-34]), is administered once-daily to ensure continuous active PTH exposure throughout the 24-hour dosing period. This marks the FDA's approval of the first and only treatment for hypoparathyroidism in adults, offered by Ascendis Pharma A/S, listed as Nasdaq: ASND.

news.headline: Bridgeline Digital introduces HawkSearch's GenAI-powered PDF data capture with Smart Response feature.
news.summary: In Woburn, Massachusetts on December 19, 2024, Bridgeline Digital, Inc. unveiled a new Smart Response feature for HawkSearch. The company, listed on NASDAQ as BLIN, specializes in AI-powered marketing technology. The latest feature utilizes GenAI to analyze PDF content and provide targeted responses to user inquiries. It enables the extraction of data from extensive PDF collections, generating useful search components like PDF thumbnails, page summaries, and metadata such as file names and categorization.

news.headline: Heritage Distilling Company appoints ex-Starbucks COO Troy Alstead and Andrew Varga to key positions for growth.
news.summary: Adding to its leadership team, the company has welcomed Troy Alstead, former COO of Starbucks, as a Director, along with Andrew Varga who joins as a Director and Strategic Consultant. Additionally, Varga will also be taking on the role of Chief Revenue Officer. These strategic hires aim to bolster the company's expertise and experience at the executive level.

news.headline: GIMOTI touted as top solution for gastroparesis as Domperidone supply ceases, aiding millions in need.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to its lowest level in five years, standing at 3.5%. This decrease is significant as it marks a 0.8% decrease from the previous year. Additionally, the report highlighted that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last month, surpassing economists' expectations. The sectors that experienced the most growth were technology, healthcare, and hospitality. Analysts attribute this positive trend to increased consumer spending and business investments. Overall, the job market is showing signs of strength and resilience, providing hope for continued economic growth in the future.

news.headline: Imbed Biosciences appoints Terry Bromley as CEO. He brings 30+ years of experience in med device industry.
news.summary: In Middleton, Wisconsin, Imbed Biosciences has appointed Terry Bromley as its new Chief Executive Officer. Bromley, who comes with more than 30 years of expertise in the medical device, regenerative medicine, wound, and skin sectors, will play a key role in driving the company's expansion. Imbed Biosciences aims to revolutionize soft tissue repair through cutting-edge technologies that enhance patient results. Bromley's extensive background in commercial leadership will be crucial in advancing the company's mission.

news.headline: Adeia Inc. signs a multi-year IP license deal with Canon, granting access to its media portfolio. Stock symbol: ADEA.
news.summary: In San Jose, California on December 19, 2024, a technology company called Adeia Inc. (Nasdaq: ADEA) has partnered with Canon, a global digital imaging leader, through a multi-year intellectual property (IP) license agreement. This deal grants Canon access to Adeia's media portfolio for innovative contributions to digital imaging.

news.headline: Cintas Corp reports $2.56 billion revenue in Q2 2025, 7.8% rise from last year. Organic growth rate at 7.1%.
news.summary: In Cincinnati, Cintas Corporation (Nasdaq: CTAS) released its fiscal 2025 second-quarter outcomes concluding on November 30, 2024. Revenue for this quarter reached $2.56 billion, showing a 7.8% rise from the previous year's $2.38 billion. The organic revenue growth rate for this quarter stood at 7.1%, accounting for the influences of acquisitions and foreign currency exchange rate fluctuations. Gross margin details were not disclosed.

news.headline: NY-based BARK, Inc. (NYSE: BARK) to present at 2025 ICR conference. CEO & CFO to chat on Jan 13, 2025, at 4:00 PM EST.
news.summary: BARK, Inc. (NYSE: BARK), a prominent worldwide dog brand aiming to ensure the happiness of all dogs, revealed that Matt Meeker, Co-Founder and CEO, and Zahir Ibrahim, CFO, are set to engage in a fireside chat at the 2025 ICR Conference in Orlando, Florida on January 13, 2025, at 4:00 p.m. ET. During this event, key updates on the Company's third-quarter performance for fiscal year 2025 are expected to be shared.

news.headline: US PCE Prices Final Actual 1.5% (Forecast -, Previous 1.5%)
US Core PCE Prices Final Actual 2.2% (Forecast 2.1%, Previous 2.1%)
US Philly Fed Business Index Actual -16.4 (Forecast 2.8, Previous -5.5)
US GDP Price Index Actual 1.9% (Forecast 1.9%, Previous 1.9%)
US GDP Deflator SA Final Actual 1.9% (Forecast -, Previous 1.9%)
US Initial Jobless Claims Actual 220k (Forecast 230k, Previous 242k)
US GDP QoQ Final Actual 3.1% (Forecast 2.8%, Previous 2.8%)
US Continued Jobless Claims Actual 1.874M (Forecast 1.8915M, Previous 1.886M)
Oman Investment Authority invests in Elon Musk's xAI, among top five AI companies. Dec 19, 2024.
news.summary: In Muscat, Oman on December 19, 2024, the Oman Investment Authority (OIA), which is the investment entity representing the Sultanate of Oman, has made a significant investment in xAI, a prominent artificial intelligence firm recognized as one of the top five in its sector. xAI also happens to be one of the companies owned by Elon Musk. This strategic investment aims to enhance advancements in artificial intelligence technology.

news.headline: Soho House & Co Inc. reports Q3 2024 results: Total members reach 267,494, up 4.8% YoY; Soho House Members at 208,078, up 13% YoY.
news.summary: In London, Soho House & Co Inc. (NYSE: SHCO), a global membership platform, reported their third quarter results for the period ending September 29, 2024. The total number of members in the third quarter of 2024 increased to 267,494, up from 264,540 in the second quarter of the same year, marking a 4.8% year-over-year growth. Specifically, Soho House Members rose to 208,078 from 204,028 in the second quarter of 2024, representing a 13% year-over-year increase.

news.headline: Anodyne Nanotech achieves breakthrough in transdermal delivery of GLP-1 drugs, delivering multi-milligram doses with over 50% bioavailability.
news.summary: In Boston, a clinical-stage biotech company, Anodyne Nanotech, unveiled positive preclinical findings for its exclusive HeroPatch™ platform. The results showcase the platform's capability to deliver multi-milligram quantities of GLP-1 receptor agonists transdermally with over 50% bioavailability. Presented on Oct. 28 at the Partnership Opportunities in Drug Delivery (PODD) conference in Boston, the data indicates readiness for clinical advancement for the HeroPatch program.

news.headline: Applied Optoelectronics exchanges $76.7M 2026 Notes for $125M 2030 Notes, 1.4M shares, $89.6K cash, in direct offering.
news.summary: In Sugar Land, Texas, on December 19, 2024, Applied Optoelectronics, Inc. (NASDAQ: AAOI) announced a significant financial transaction. The company revealed that it had reached agreements with holders of its 5.25% Convertible Senior Notes due 2026 (2026 Notes) to exchange about $76.7 million principal amount of the 2026 Notes for various assets. These assets include around $125 million aggregate principal amount of 2.75% Convertible Senior Notes due 2030 (2030 Notes), approximately 1,487,874 shares of the company's common stock (Exchange Shares), and roughly $89.6 thousand in cash. The cash portion accounts for accrued interest on the 2026 Notes and the value of fractional shares. This exchange, known as the "Exchanges," marks a significant financial maneuver for the company.

news.headline: Stock futures indicate 300-point Dow bounce after post-Fed panic, showing positive market sentiment.
Heliospectra launches Dynamic MITRA X multi-channel LED solutions for precise crop growth.
news.summary: In Sweden, on December 19, 2024, Heliospectra AB introduced its latest product, the Dynamic MITRA X multi-channel LED solutions. This new offering includes advanced configurations with 3 channels and 4 channels, marking a significant development in smart LED lighting for controlled environments. Heliospectra AB is recognized globally for its expertise in this field, making this launch a notable event in the industry.

news.headline: Putin: Ukraine refused to extend the gas transit deal; it's clear there won't be a transit contract. we will survive it.
Palo Alto Networks attains FedRAMP's highest approval for 20+ solutions, leading in cybersecurity platforms.
news.summary: In a significant development, a wide-ranging platform strategy has gained strong government endorsement with the approval of over 20 solutions covering network, cloud, and security operations. This validation was granted to Palo Alto Networks® (NASDAQ: PANW), a top cybersecurity provider based in Santa Clara, California. This indicates a notable achievement for the company in the cybersecurity sector as of December 19, 2024.

news.headline: Hanover Insurance Group (NYSE: THG) to release Q4 and full-year financial results on Feb 4, 2025, after market close.
news.summary: In Worcester, Massachusetts, on December 19, 2024, The Hanover Insurance Group, Inc. (NYSE: THG) has announced plans to release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year on Tuesday, February 4, 2025, after the market closes. They are set to host a webcast discussing these results the following day.

news.headline: Plus3 IT awarded subcontract for DLA JETS 2.0 by Emagine IT. The contract is for DLA J6 Enterprise Technology Services.
news.summary: Reston, Virginia - On December 19, 2024, Plus3 IT Systems, LLC, also known as Plus3 IT, has secured a subcontract from Emagine IT, Inc. for the Defense Logistics Agency (DLA) J6 Enterprise Technology Services (JETS) 2.0 contract. This significant award will provide Plus3 IT with the opportunity to be involved in important technological projects related to the Defense Logistics Agency.

news.headline: "Canada's digital asset custodian Balance launches EigenLayer protocol support for Ethereum restaking, enabling staking of native assets like ETH and ERC-20 tokens."
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, Balance, Canada's top digital asset custodian, has introduced support for Ethereum restaking through EigenLayer. EigenLayer is a protocol on the Ethereum network allowing asset owners to stake assets like ETH, EIGEN, or ERC-20 tokens (e.g., stETH, cbETH, lsETH) to safeguard decentralized Ethereum applications. This move enables new projects to access Ethereum's security benefits without the need to establish their own network security measures. Balance, the oldest and largest custodian in Canada, aims to enhance the security and efficiency of digital asset management for its clients.

news.headline: Amentum awarded $279 million U.S. Air Force contract for airfield management solutions, enhancing military's mission readiness.
news.summary: Amentum, a prominent global engineering and technology solutions provider, secured a substantial contract worth $279 million from the U.S. Air Force. The contract involves delivering aviation operations solutions for the Ninth Air Force (Air Forces Central). This significant deal highlights Amentum’s dedication to improving the mission readiness and operational effectiveness of the U.S. military on a global scale. Amentum's track record in managing intricate operations in demanding environments reinforces its ability to support the military effectively.

news.headline: Richtech Robotics unveiling cutting-edge service robots at CES 2025, including AI-powered Scorpion Robot and advanced delivery bots.
Edible Garden sees 51% sales increase during key Thanksgiving period in 2024.
SEALSQ's eUICC tech brings Post-Quantum security to mobile devices, aiding global telcos against quantum threats.
news.summary: In Geneva, Switzerland, on December 19, 2024, SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES) disclosed that their GSMA-accredited eUICC technology now supports Post-Quantum security for mobile phones and connected devices. SEALSQ, a company specializing in Semiconductors, PKI, and Post-Quantum tech products, is set to revolutionize the global GSMA ecosystem with this advancement. This technology promises enhanced trust, security, and interoperability. Telcos stand to benefit by streamlining operations, expanding connectivity globally, and fortifying their infrastructure against potential quantum threats. This development marks SEALSQ as a significant player in the industry.

news.headline: 85% of companies making progress in AI strategy, 47% achieved positive ROI. Many turning to open-source AI tools to optimize investments in 2025.
news.summary: A recent survey of IT decision makers revealed that 85% have seen advancements in their companies' AI strategies for 2024, with 47% indicating they have already attained a positive return on investment. Additionally, nearly half of the surveyed companies are considering utilizing open-source AI to enhance their investments in 2025. The survey was conducted in Armonk, New York, and the results were released on December 19, 2024.

news.headline: Pocamarket wins 'Best K-POP Photocard Platform' at 2024 KBS N Brand Awards. Operated by Infludeo Co., it's a subsidiary of KBS.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, on December 19, 2024, Pocamarket, a K-POP photocard trading platform owned by Infludeo Co., Ltd., has been recognized as the 'Best K-POP Photocard Platform' at the prestigious 2024 KBS N Brand Awards, organized by KBS N. This award is a significant achievement for Pocamarket, showcasing its excellence in the industry. Operating under the umbrella of KBS (Korean Broadcasting System), the platform has garnered attention for its outstanding performance.

news.headline: Sapience Therapeutics granted FDA Orphan Drug Designation for ST316, a β-catenin Antagonist for Familial Adenomatous Polyposis.
news.summary: A biotechnology company called Sapience Therapeutics, Inc. based in Tarrytown, N.Y., revealed on Dec. 19, 2024, their focus on developing peptide therapeutics to combat cancer-related oncogenic and immune dysregulation. The company shared the news of their current clinical-stage efforts.

news.headline: SWA Lithium conducts field-testing at Arkansas project in collaboration with Koch Technology, to confirm engineering design.
news.summary: SWA Lithium and Koch Technology Solutions have joined forces to create and oversee the construction and operation of a field-pilot Direct Lithium Extraction (DLE) facility. This collaboration aims to validate the engineering design for a specific SWA project. The facility will serve as a testing ground to ensure the efficiency and feasibility of the project, with potential widespread implications. This partnership signals a significant step forward in lithium extraction technology, utilizing innovative methods to address evolving industry demands.

news.headline: CarMax's Q3 earnings beat sales views with $6.223B revenue; EPS of 81 cents exceeds consensus of 64 cents. CarMax Auto Finance income grew by 7.6% to $159.9M. Retail used unit sales increased by 5.4% year over year.
news.summary: CarMax, Inc. (NYSE:KMX) saw its stock rise following the reporting of its third-quarter earnings. The company's quarterly sales reached $6.223 billion, surpassing the predicted $6.042 billion. Earnings per share were reported at 81 cents, exceeding the anticipated 64 cents as per analysts' consensus. CarMax Auto Finance income stood at $159.9 million, reflecting a 7.6% increase compared to the previous year, attributed to a rise in CAF's net interest margin percentage and higher average managed receivables. The provision for loan losses remained in line with expectations set at the close of the second quarter. Retail used unit sales also experienced a 5.4% year-on-year increase.

news.headline: Soho House (NYSE: SHCO) received an offer of $9/share, an 83% premium over closing price of $4.91 on Dec 18, 2024.
news.summary: In London, Soho House & Co Inc. (NYSE: SHCO) recently received a takeover offer from a third-party consortium to purchase the Company for $9.00 per share. This offer presents an 83% premium compared to the closing price on Wednesday, December 18, 2024. The proposal is subject to the agreement of key shareholders, such as the Company's Executive Chairman, Ron Burkle, and The Yucaipa Companies.
